notices.title: Short Tender Notice
notices.detail: A Short Tender Notice is an official announcement inviting bids or quotations for a project or service within a limited timeframe, usually issued in urgent situations requiring quick procurement.

notices.title: Walk-in Interview for National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS).
notices.detail: A walk-in interview under the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS) allows eligible candidates to directly appear for selection, offering hands-on training opportunities to enhance practical skills and industry experience.
